knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior_sections + active packet; zero Python outside packet.

exercises.code:
from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = "Entrada"
ws["A1"] = "region"
print(wb.sheetnames, ws["A1"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.append(["region", "monto"])
ws.append(["Lima", 10.0])
print(ws.max_row)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
wb.active.title = "Datos"
wb.create_sheet("Salida")
print(wb.sheetnames)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["B1"] = "=A1+A2"
print(str(ws["B1"].value).startswith("="))

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = 3
ws["A2"] = 4
print(ws["A1"].value + ws["A2"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"].font = Font(bold=True)
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import PatternFill
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
print(ws["A1"].fill is not None)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill
def header_style(ws, cell):
    ws[cell].font = Font(bold=True)
    ws[cell].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from datetime import date
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = date(2024, 1, 15)
print(ws["A1"].value.isoformat())

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.merge_cells("B1:C1")
ws["B1"] = "x"
print(ws["C1"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.merge_cells("A1:B1")
ws.merge_cells("C1:D1")
print(len(ws.merged_cells.ranges))

detalle, portada, tol = 15.0, 15.0, 0.01
print(abs(detalle - portada) < tol)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"], "monto": [10.0, 7.0, 5.0]})
print(df.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) <= tol
print(reconcile(22.0, 22.005))
print(reconcile(22.0, 23))

expected = ["region", "monto"]
got = ["region", "monto"]
print(expected == got)

st = ["ok", "corrupt", "ok"]
print(sum(1 for s in st if s == "ok"))

name = "report.lock"
print("locked" if name.endswith(".lock") or "lock" in name else "ok")
print({"backup": "/tmp/master.bak.xlsx", "idempotent": True})

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: openpyxl without Excel does not auto-evaluate formulas.
Theory: write to merged cell anchor (top-left).
Theory: manifest audits batch status, reconcile, backups.
Theory: idempotence = same input → same logical result.
